meaning: n.一群鸟,一群(少女或少妇),<俗>一堆东西,一群人
examples: A bevy of statistics this week pointed to a weakening economy.
Recently a bevy of shoes based on similar principles have hit the U.S. market.
That indeed was the message a bevy of hawkish Fed presidents delivered in the past week.
Socialite Bevy Smith is a Range Rover Evoque City Shaper in New York.
Beyond holding a bevy of state- and federal-level tech policy jobs, Fazzino's been a pol himself.
